items.title: Video shows correspondents' dinner suspect charge checkpoint
items.dek: Surveillance video released by Donald Trump shows the suspect running past metal detectors as security agents draw their guns.
items.body: Surveillance video released by Donald Trump shows the suspect running past metal detectors as security agents draw their guns.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: What it was like in the room as shots rang out at correspondents' dinner
items.dek: The BBC's Gary O'Donoghue describes the moment he and others dived for cover as shots rang out at the venue.
items.body: The BBC's Gary O'Donoghue describes the moment he and others dived for cover as shots rang out at the venue.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'You just didn't know': Gary O'Donoghue describes confusion and fears at correspondents' dinner
items.dek: Police say a man charged security outside of the dining room and was armed with multiple weapons.
items.body: Police say a man charged security outside of the dining room and was armed with multiple weapons.
items.author: IriLine Desk
